narrative:
Bennington Township has 2,100 registered voters, with 51.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.5 percentage points.
